common.requestFailed: Request failed. Please try again later.

login.description: Sign in with your username and password. Future writing requests will include the auth header automatically.
login.title: Sign in to Blogi

register.cta: Already have an account? Sign in
register.description: A successful registration creates the local session immediately and sends you to the admin area.
register.title: Create an author account

home.loadError: Failed to load posts. Make sure the backend is running.

comments.error: Failed to load comments. Please try again later.
comments.title: Comments

post.loadError: The post does not exist, or the backend is unavailable.

postEditor.previewFallback:
## Preview

Write your Markdown content here.
postEditor.summaryPlaceholder: Optional. If empty, the backend will generate one from the content.
postEditor.tagsPlaceholder: Separate with commas, for example: Nuxt, Spring
postEditor.title: Title

overview.description: Review content status and jump into the most common management actions from here.
overview.latestPlaceholder: The most recent update will appear here after you create a post.
overview.quickActionsDescription: Open the post list or jump straight into the editor.
overview.title: Overview

posts.description: Manage published posts, update existing content, or create a new post.
posts.emptyDescription: Use the left navigation or the button above to write your first post.
posts.listError: Failed to load posts. Make sure the backend is running.
posts.title: Post management

newPost.description: Create and publish a post. Published posts appear immediately in the public list.
newPost.formDescription: After saving, the post becomes public immediately. Categories and tags are created automatically for filtering.
newPost.title: Write post

editPost.description: Update the title, summary, category, tags, and Markdown content. Saving refreshes the public post page.
editPost.formDescription: Only the author can update this content. Clearing the category or tags removes the post from those filters.
editPost.loadError: Failed to load the post for editing.
editPost.title: Edit post

settings.description: Adjust how the blog is presented on the public site.

footer.description: Customize the public footer HTML. After saving, it appears on the home page and post detail pages.
footer.empty: The footer is empty, so the public pages will not render a footer section.
footer.hint: This content is rendered as trusted HTML. Only save markup that you wrote yourself or have verified as safe. If you clear and save it, the public site stops showing the footer.
footer.label: HTML template
footer.loadError: Failed to load footer settings. Make sure the backend is running.
footer.title: Footer settings

card.description: Show post summaries in a card grid, which works well when you want multiple entries to compete for attention.
card.label: Card layout

layout.description: Choose how the public post list is displayed. The setting is stored in the current browser.

list.description: Display the current post list as a vertical time-ordered list.
list.label: List layout

layout.title: Post list layout

settings.title: Blog settings
